pkg/framework/entutils/testutils/ent1/sc.purpose: Test fixture Ent schema used exclusively by entutils transaction tests. Provides a minimal single-entity schema (Example1) to exercise TransactingRepo, TxCreator, and related Ent test infrastructure without coupling to production domain schemas.

patterns.name: Embed ent.Schema
patterns.description: Every schema struct must embed ent.Schema as an anonymous field — required by Ent's code generator.

patterns.name: Use entutils.TimeMixin
patterns.description: Apply entutils.TimeMixin{} in Mixin() to get standard created_at/updated_at timestamps consistent with production schemas.

patterns.name: Immutable string ID field
patterns.description: Declare the primary key as field.String("id").Unique().Immutable() — matches production schema conventions for ULID/string PKs.

patterns.name: Return empty slices for unused schema hooks
patterns.description: Return []ent.Index{} and []ent.Edge{} when there are no indexes or edges — do not omit the methods.

key_file_guides.role: Sole test entity schema. Provides a minimal two-field entity (id + example_value_1) with TimeMixin for testing entutils transaction helpers.
key_file_guides.watch_for: Do not add production business logic here. Schema changes require regenerating the testutils ent client via go generate in the testutils package.

anti_patterns: Adding production domain fields or edges — this schema is a test fixture only
Omitting entutils.TimeMixin — breaks consistency with production schema conventions tested by entutils
Using integer or UUID primary keys instead of string — mismatches the ULID string PK pattern used in production
Skipping Indexes() or Edges() methods — Ent codegen expects all four interface methods to be present

decisions.decision: Minimal schema with only two fields
decisions.rationale: Test fixtures need just enough structure to exercise transaction semantics (read/write/rollback) without the complexity of real domain entities that would create test maintenance burden.

decisions.decision: Reuse entutils.TimeMixin instead of raw timestamp fields
decisions.rationale: Ensures the test schema exercises the same mixin path as production schemas, catching any regressions in TimeMixin behavior.

code_examples.scenario: Defining a new test-fixture Ent schema entity with TimeMixin and string PK
